author: ShadyTidus
name: ShadyStatus
short: Multi-game server status with game-specific formatting
description: Query game servers via Steam A2S protocol and display status with game-specific formatting. Supports 7 Days to Die, ARK, Rust, Valheim, Project Zomboid, V Rising, and generic A2S servers. Features autocomplete, per-user rate limiting, and optional status channel.
install_msg:
ShadyStatus installed!

Setup:
1. Add servers: `[p]shadystatus add <name> <ip> <port> <game>`
2. Users query with: `/server <name>` (with autocomplete)

Supported games: 7dtd, ark, rust, valheim, pz, vrising, generic
end_user_data_statement: This cog temporarily stores query timestamps for rate limiting (in memory only).
